description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a single test stage and a shared cache named 'common' with paths .cache and vendor, sets the variables COMPOSER_CACHE_DIR to .cache/composer and DOCROOT to ${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/web, and adds three Behat jobs for PHP 5.6, PHP 7.0, and PHP 7.1. Each job runs on the 'docker' tag, uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/dmore/docker-chrome-headless matching its PHP version (5.6, 7.0, 7.1), and executes the script commands: composer install -o --ansi --no-progress and vendor/bin/behat --colors. No artifacts, services, or conditional rules are defined.
